name: awareness-graph
description: See the invariants, failure modes, and intent that govern the file you are editing — straight from your project's awareness graph.

awarenessGraph.serverAddr.description: Address of the awareness-graph gRPC server (host:port). Started with `awg serve`.

awarenessGraph.domain.description: Domain/repo scope (e.g. github.com/owner/repo). Required when the graph hosts more than one domain; leave empty for a single-domain graph.

awarenessGraph.mode.description: Preflight detail level. compact: top few anchors; standard: a fuller set.

awarenessGraph.enabled.description: Query the awareness graph as you switch files. Turn off to stop all background gRPC calls.

awarenessGraph.enableLocalOperations.description: Allow the dashboard to run the local `awg` CLI in your workspace for write operations (e.g. promoting a reviewed candidate). Off by default: the dashboard stays read-only and shows the guarded CLI to run yourself. When on, promotion runs `awg promote` in your working tree and surfaces the resulting git diff for you to review and commit — it never auto-commits.

awarenessGraph.awgPath.description: Path to the `awg` CLI used for local operations (see awarenessGraph.enableLocalOperations). Defaults to `awg` on PATH.

awarenessGraph.servicesRepoPath.description: Path to the sibling `services` repo, for rebuilding the COMBINED awareness-graph + services seed. Required only when the workspace is the awareness-graph repo (whose committed seed is the combined graph). When set, Rebuild runs `awg rebuild --services-repo <path>`; relative paths resolve against the awareness-graph repo root. Leave empty to auto-detect `../services` — if the workspace needs a combined seed and none is found, Rebuild is disabled rather than silently producing a single-repo seed.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run sync-proto && npm run compile
